summary_en: 95,200 shares (5.94% S/O) up to ¥100M limit. Execution: 2026-05-26 to 2026-11-25 (trade-date basis). Method: open-market purchase via lead-broker agreement on TSE. Rationale: capital efficiency and flexible capital allocation.
title_en: Notice Regarding Decision on Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Branding Technology Inc. announced on 21 May 2026 a share buyback program approved by the board on the same date. The company is authorized to repurchase up to 95,200 shares (5.94% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate consideration not to exceed ¥100 million. Execution will run from 26 May 2026 to 25 November 2026 on a trade-date basis via open-market purchase under a lead-broker agreement on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The stated rationale is to enhance capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation policy. As of 31 March 2026, the company held zero treasury shares against 1,602,215 issued shares outstanding.
